description: During `cargo test -p dspy-rs --features rlm`, I observed one run where multiple `modules::rlm::exec` tests failed with `ImportError: Loaded module dsrs_exec not found in sys.modules` and traceback assertions failed, but immediate rerun passed cleanly. This suggests potential flake in PyO3 module loading/execution helper path (`crates/dspy-rs/src/modules/rlm/exec.rs` with `PyModule::from_code`). Reproduce under repeated/parallel runs and harden if needed.
title: Investigate flaky RLM exec ImportError in feature-gated test run
